ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node or tower */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the node */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the node */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the node */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Height of the node */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the node */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell technology */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell technology */,
  "technology_standard" TEXT /* Technology standard of the cell technology */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the cell technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_areas" (
  "lac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location area code */,
  "lac_name" TEXT /* Name of the location area */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Geographical coverage area of the location area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the location area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the location area */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the location area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location area was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection metric */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell for which metrics are recorded */,
  "connection_time" INTEGER /* Time in milliseconds since the last connection */,
  "signal_strength" INTEGER /* Signal strength of the cell connection */,
  "data_usage" REAL /* Amount of data used during the connection */,
  "upload_speed" REAL /* Upload speed of the connection */,
  "download_speed" REAL /* Download speed of the connection */,
  "ping_time" REAL /* Ping time of the connection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection metric was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, support) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cell data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cell data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm event */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., low signal strength, high latency) */,
  "alarm_level" TEXT /* Level of the alarm (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily usage, monthly performance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
